tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: It has now reached the point where I truly believe that public officials and politicians who continue to knowingly import third world savages into our communities should be prosecuted. It is that reckless, that irresponsible, that dangerous. People need to go to prison.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：现在我真的相信，那些继续故意将第三世界野蛮人输入我们社区的公职人员和政客应该受到起诉。这是多么的鲁莽、多么的不负责任、多么的危险。人们需要进监狱。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: I’m a gay man and I’m done staying silent. I survived bullying, the coming-out wars, and actual hate for who I am. What I won’t accept is importing millions from cultures where they throw us off rooftops, hang us, or jail us for life. Pride flags in Tehran? Laughable. Open borders + unchecked migration from places that treat gays like vermin isn’t “compassion” — it’s suicide for everything we fought for. Protect Western values or watch them disappear. Gay rights aren’t compatible with mass immigration from the most anti-gay societies on Earth. Change my mind.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：我是一名同性恋者，我已经厌倦了保持沉默。我经历了欺凌、出柜战争和对自己的真正仇恨。我不会接受的是从那些把我们从屋顶上扔下来、绞死我们或终身监禁的文化中引进数百万人。德黑兰的骄傲旗帜？可笑。开放边界+从对待同性恋如害虫的地方不受限制的移民并不是“同情”——这对我们为之奋斗的一切来说都是自杀。保护西方价值观，否则就会眼睁睁地看着它们消失。同性恋权利与来自地球上最反同性恋的社会的大规模移民并不相容。改变我的想法。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Mindestens vier Mädchen im Alter von 12 bis 14 Jahren wurden am vergangenen Samstagnachmittag in einem Schwimmbad in Schwäbisch Gmünd Opfer sexueller Übergriffe. Tatverdächtig ist ein 21-jähriger Afghane. Er soll den Mädchen nicht nur an den Hintern und Oberschenkel gefasst haben. Er wollte wohl auch die Bikini-Unterteile herunterziehen. Bei einem Mädchen soll er zudem versucht haben, mit den Fingern in den Intimbereich einzudringen, was bedeutet, dass es sich aus rechtlicher Sicht um eine versuchte Vergewaltigung handeln dürfte. Der Tatverdächtige wurde zwar festgenommen, die Staatsanwaltschaft beantragte auch einen Haftbefehl, aber der zuständige Richter setzte ihn außer Vollzug. Der Kerl rennt also weiterhin frei unter uns herum. Die Auflage, keine Freibäder aufzusuchen, wird ihn mit Sicherheit wenig interessieren, zumal das gar nicht kontrolliert werden kann. Meine Güte, sperrt solche Leute doch weg und schiebt sie ab. Für solche Personen braucht es die Möglichkeit eines Eilverfahrens, in dem nicht nur wegen der begangenen Straftat verhandelt wird, sondern auch der mögliche Aufenthaltstitel entzogen und zeitlich unbefristete Abschiebehaft angeordnet werden kann. Warum müssen wir diese Täter weiter hier erdulden und finanzieren?
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：上周六下午，至少四名年龄在 12 岁至 14 岁之间的女孩在施瓦格明德的一个游泳池里遭受性侵犯。嫌疑人为一名 21 岁阿富汗男子。据说他不仅抓住了女孩的臀部和大腿。他可能还想把比基尼泳裤拉下来。据说他还试图用手指插入女孩的私处，这意味着从法律角度来看这可能是强奸未遂。嫌疑人被逮捕，检察官也申请了逮捕令，但主审法官将其停职。所以这家伙继续在我们中间自由奔跑。他肯定对不去室外游泳池的要求不感兴趣，尤其是因为这根本无法控制。我的天啊，把这样的人关起来然后驱逐出境。对于这些人，需要有可能进行快速诉讼，不仅审理所犯罪行，还可以吊销可能的居留许可，并下令无限期拘留并驱逐出境。为什么我们必须继续容忍和资助这些肇事者？

tweets.content: Sad to see EU cutting their users off from the best liquidity in the world. Liquidity is the best consumer protection. Hope to see things change in the future.
tweets.translated: 很遗憾看到欧盟切断了用户与世界上最好的流动性的联系。流动性是对消费者最好的保障。希望未来能看到事情的改变。

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Robotics is next. Both deal count and investment amounts are skyrocketing per pitchbook March data (source: a16z) Good thing is: the same AI DC exposure often has cross-exposure to humanoid ramp. Like DRAM/NAND with memory (on humanoid inference/storage) or DFB lasers with photonics (FMCW LiDAR vision/sensing). Right now most exposure is upstream component parts… or programs within large players like $AMZN or $TSLA. So global IPO season H2 into 2027 for pure play humanoids/robotics companies is going to be fun.
tweets.translated: 机器人技术是下一个。根据 3 月份数据，交易数量和投资金额都在飙升（来源：a16z） 好的一面是：同样的 AI DC 曝光通常会与人形爬坡交叉曝光。就像带有内存的 DRAM/NAND（用于人形推理/存储）或带有光子学的 DFB 激光器（FMCW LiDAR 视觉/传感）。目前，大多数曝光都是上游零部件……或者是 $AMZN 或 $TSLA 等大型企业内部的程序。因此，对于纯粹的类人/机器人公司来说，2027 年下半年的全球 IPO 季将会很有趣。

tweets.content: Kinda nutty OpenAI’s is launching its heavyweight 5.6 Sol frontier model on $CBRS. At up to 750 tokens/sec, which is obscene performance. American inference go brrr. I actually picked up starter positions on Cerebras for the first time in the ~170s (below $185 IPO price) after seeing this news yesterday. Feels like validation of its tech. IMO a bit overvalued compared to profitable companies like $JBL at the same valuation. But there’s likely premiums for OpenAI exposure, as long as they stay the leader.
tweets.translated: 有点疯狂的 OpenAI 正在 $CBRS 上推出其重量级 5.6 Sol 前沿模型。高达 750 个令牌/秒，这是令人不快的性能。美国的推理去吧。事实上，在昨天看到这个消息后，我在大约 170 年代（低于 185 美元的 IPO 价格）第一次获得了 Cerebras 的首发头寸。感觉像是对其技术的验证。与同等估值的 JBL 等盈利公司相比，IMO 的估值有点高估。但只要 OpenAI 保持领先地位，他们的曝光度就可能会溢价。

tweets.content: $SPCX / Elon Musk acquires Mesh, an optical networking startup. Which is working on 1.6T OSFP (pluggable). It’s seems they own the optical engine/packaging side of things, but likely sources CW DFB lasers off merchant companies. $SIVE is one of the more startup friendly plausible merchant suppliers as seen with Ayar to $POET? Maybe $LITE and $MTSI that were have a little history too, but less so. Regardless it’s very positive a lot of startups recently like Celestial have been acquired by Marvell. For both merchant laser supplier revenue (working with startups -> having hyperscalers like SpaceX drive revenue after being designed in already). As well as valuations from M&A desirability. Goes to show how optical interconnects is the right direction if Elon Musk is directly buying these companies.
tweets.translated: $SPCX / Elon Musk 收购了光网络初创公司 Mesh。它正在 1.6T OSFP（可插拔）上运行。他们似乎拥有光学引擎/封装方面的所有权，但很可能从商业公司采购 CW DFB 激光器。 $SIVE 是对初创公司更友好的商业供应商之一，正如 Ayar 到 $POET 所看到的那样？也许 $LITE 和 $MTSI 也有一些历史，但历史较少。不管怎样，最近有很多像 Celestial 这样的初创公司被 Marvell 收购，这是非常积极的。对于商业激光供应商的收入（与初创公司合作 -> 让像 SpaceX 这样的超大规模企业在设计完成后推动收入）。以及来自并购意愿的估值。去证明如果埃隆·马斯克直接收购这些公司，光互连是正确的方向。
